title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle: Hospital Wing Toy - DIY Miniature Model Kit with 7 Minifigures incl. Hermione & Ron - Gift Idea for 9+ Year Old Girls, Boys & Fans - 76463
features: HOGWARTS CASTLE TOY – Play out Harry Potter fantasy adventures with the LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle: Hospital Wing building toy for 9+ year old boys, girls and fans

3-LEVEL BUILDING – Explore the Harry Potter castle toy with 3 levels, featuring the removable Defence Against the Dark Arts (DADA) classroom on the lower level, the Hospital Wing and the Ravenclaw Common Room
7 LEGO HARRY POTTER MINIFIGURES – With Harry Potter characters Remus Lupin, Ron Weasley, a Dementor, Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Penelope Clearwater and The Grey Lady

PACKED WITH DETAILS AND ACCESSORIES – Look out for the Wolf Patronus, part of a LEGO Harry Potter 25th anniversary Patronus collection (in sets sold separately), and 2 of 14 collectible Hogwarts portraits
HARRY POTTER GIFT FOR KIDS – This LEGO building toy makes a magical birthday gift for 9+ year old girls, boys and older fans of the Wizarding World
A FUN WAY TO BUILD – The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure where they can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models using 3D instructions while they build
LEGO HARRY POTTER COLLECTIBLE – This model building kit is part of a series of modular sets (sold separately) that together create the most detailed brick-built Hogwarts Castle scene to date
description: From the manufacturer Gift for Harry Potter lovers Enchanting castle building set for kids Play out Harry Potter stories with this 3-level Hogwarts Castle building toy, featuring the hospital wing, a classroom and Ravenclaw common room – a wizard gift for girls, boys and any fans aged 9 years old and over. LEGO Harry Potter decor Explore classic Hogwarts locations Young wizards, witches and Muggles can role-play classic scenes, create their own magical adventures with iconic characters, and display their impressive LEGO brick model between playtimes. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Expand the castle scene This model is part of a collection of sets (sold separately) that connects to create the most detailed LEGO brick-built Hogwarts Castle scene yet. 7 LEGO Harry Potter minifigures Remus Lupin, Ron Weasley, a Dementor, Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Penelope Clearwater and The Grey Lady, plus a Wolf Patronus and spider. Magical details and accessories Explore the Hogwarts Hospital Wing and Ravenclaw Common Room. Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom Remove the DADA room from the rocky foundations for easy play. Wolf Patronus Play out magical scenes with Remus Lupin’s Wolf Patronus, one in a series of 25th anniversary collectable Patronuses (sold separately). Next page LEGO Builder Enhanced, interactive fun Add a little extra magic to kids’ creative experience with the intuitive LEGO Builder app, which lets them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, track their progress and save sets as they develop new skills. Previous page Luna Lovegood's House Explore the whimsical world of the Lovegoods with the first LEGO Harry Potter model of Luna Lovegood’s house, plus 5 minifigures and a collectible Patronus. Hogwarts Castle: Sorting Hat Ceremony Invite kids to join Professor McGonagall, Harry Potter, Hermione Granger and Draco Malfoy for a Sorting Hat ceremony. Set includes a collectable Patronus. Cauldron: Secret Potions Classroom Create a magic cauldron that opens to reveal a secret potions classroom with this spellbinding Harry Potter model building kit for play and display. Next page

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
